topics.title: Radio Contest Safety and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangers of extreme radio contests, personal frustrations with apartment maintenance, and recent celebrity news regarding Kate Moss and Lindsay Lohan.

topics.title: Celebrity Scandals and Psychic Fraud
topics.summary: The studio critiques the erratic behavior of Lindsay Lohan and Kate Moss before mocking a television psychic who provided false information regarding a missing child's location.

topics.title: JD's Family Dynamics and Reunion Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses JD's estranged relationship with his mother in Hawaii, the influence of his father Chuck, and the possibility of filming a reunion special.

topics.title: Adult Video News Awards Highlights
topics.summary: The studio reviews footage and highlights from the Adult Video News awards, featuring appearances by Kimberly Kane, JD Hameyer, and Carrot Top.

topics.title: Adult Film Industry Awards and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The show features discussions regarding adult film industry awards, listener feedback on a specific performer, and a segment involving a caller who claims to have dated a co-host.

topics.title: Joe Frazier's Real Estate Loss
topics.summary: The studio discusses Joe Frazier's financial struggles following a land deal gone wrong and his historical relationship with Muhammad Ali.

topics.title: Joe Frazier Reflects on Boxing and Life
topics.summary: The studio features Joe Frazier as he discusses his career, his rivalry with Muhammad Ali, his early life in Philadelphia, and his current personal life.

topics.title: Boxing Legends and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion between boxing figures regarding the legacies of Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier, followed by a segment featuring a prank phone call.

topics.title: Beetlejuice Retrospective and Logistics
topics.summary: The studio promotes a Beetlejuice retrospective on Howard TV before transitioning into a discussion about the logistical challenges of coordinating family dinners, real estate investments, and personal anecdotes regarding family dynamics.

topics.title: Chuck Qualman and J.D.'s Family Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal history of Chuck Qualman and his relationship with J.D., while discussing family dynamics and past experiences.

topics.title: Greatest Guitar Solos of All Time
topics.summary: The studio explores a ranked list of iconic guitar solos, highlighting performances by Jimi Hendrix, David Gilmour, and Eddie Van Halen.

topics.title: Guitar Solo Rankings and Roswell Discussion
topics.summary: The studio reviews a list of top guitar solos from Guitar World Magazine before transitioning to a segment on extraterrestrial theories regarding the Roswell crash.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and American Idol Ratings
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential merger of Sirius and XM, the high viewership numbers for American Idol, and various segments including celebrity news and musical performances.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Sports Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including American Idol, NFL quarterback Michael Vick's drug investigation, sports betting odds, celebrity legal issues involving Foxy Brown, and Hugh Hefner’s personal life.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news including Lindsay Lohan's rehab, the career of Ben Affleck, and political updates regarding Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton alongside reports on cancer rates and military strategy.
